display_name: FDA AI Device Authorisation Evidence Gaps
citation: Wu E, Wu K, Daneshjou R, et al. How medical AI devices are evaluated: limitations and recommendations from an analysis of FDA approvals. Nat Med. 2021;27(4):582-584.
case_summary: Found many FDA-authorized AI devices lacked multi-site validation, demographic subgroup analysis, and prospective evidence.
